data.title: Williams-Sonoma declares $0.57 dividend
data.description:
• Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) declared $0.57/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 1.2%
  • Payable Feb. 21; for shareholders of record Jan. 17; ex-div Jan. 17.
  • See WSM Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Great Elm Capital raises $13.2 million of equity at net asset value
data.description:
• Great Elm Capital (NASDAQ:GECC) on Thursday said it has issued about 1.1 million shares of the company’s common stock at $12.06 per share, for a gross purchase price of $13.2 million, to Summit Grove Partners (SGP).
  • Great Elm Group made a $3.3 million investment in SGP, further aligning the company’s investment manager with shareholders.
  • GEG +1.12% premarket to $1.79.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Onfolio sells BWPS WordPress business for $780K
data.description:
• Onfolio (NASDAQ:ONFO) said it has completed the sale of its BWPS WordPress business for $780K to WebStreet an all-cash deal.
  • The firm said $650K in cash was released immediately and $130K was held back pending final completion of migration.
  • The firm said it expects to see a capital gain of ~$150K from the sale.
  • “We decided to sell our BWPS WordPress business so that our management team can focus on our growing B2B agency portfolio, and our information products business lines, which now constitute our core businesses," said CEO, Dominic Wells.
  • Wells added the firm plans to use the $780K to strengthen its balance sheet, for working capital, and to facilitate additional acquisitions in its core businesses.

data.title: PennantPark Floating Rate Capital upsizes joint venture
data.description:
• PennantPark Floating Rate Capital (NYSE:PFLT) has agreed to expand its investment in PennantPark Senior Secured Loan Fund I LLC.
  • PFLT and its JV partner jointly agreed to invest an additional $100M of capital in PSSL.
  • In conjunction with increased leverage capacity at PSSL, the $100M investment will expand the JV’s total investment capacity to $1.5B, representing a nearly $500M increase.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Intercontinental Exchange launches MSCI MarketAxess Tradable Corporate Bond Index futures
data.description:
• Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) has launched MSCI MarketAxess Tradable Corporate Bond Index futures.
  • The futures contracts will be based on MSCI and MarketAxess' newly created corporate bond indices.
  • These tradable indices aim to provide a benchmark for the performance of the corporate bond market.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Bitdeer files $1B mixed securities shelf
data.description:
• Bitdeer Technologies (NASDAQ:BTDR) filed a prospectus related to a mixed shelf offering to raise up to $1B.
  • This prospectus is not an offer to sell these securities.

data.title: Star Group announces definitive acquisition agreement
data.description:
• Star Group (NYSE:SGU) on Thursday said it has entered into a definitive agreement to purchase a home energy distributor, located within the company’s existing operating footprint, for approximately $68 million before working capital adjustments.
  • Star anticipates closing on the transaction within the next 45 days. Additional terms were not disclosed.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: micromobility.com appoints Gian Luca Spriano as CEO
data.description:
• micromobility.com on Thursday said it has appointed Gian Luca Spriano as chief executive officer (CEO) and member of the board of directors, effective December 9, 2024.
  • Spriano succeeds Salvatore Palella, who has stepped down from his roles as CEO and director. Palella, the company’s controlling shareholder, has no remaining executive or board position within the organization.
  • Spriano has been with the company since July 2018, serving in key roles including Head of Business Development and most recently as chief financial officer (CFO) since December 2023.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Rio Tinto to invest $2.5B to expand Rincon lithium project in Argentina
data.description:
• Rio Tinto (NYSE:RIO) has announced plans to invest $2.5B to expand its Rincon lithium project in Argentina.
  • The investment will boost the project’s production capacity to 60,000 tonnes of battery grade lithium carbonate per year, comprised of the 3,000-tonne starter plant and 57,000-tonne expansion plant.
  • Construction of the expanded plant is scheduled to begin in mid-2025, with first production expected in 2028 followed by a three-year ramp up to full capacity.
  • Located in the heart of the ‘lithium triangle’ in Argentina, Rincon’s mine life is expected to be 40 years.
  • RIO shares were down 1.57% premarket on Thursday.

data.title: Initial jobless claims unexpectedly jump in past week
data.description: Initial jobless claims for the week ended Dec. 7 rose by 17K to 242K, well above the 221K consensus and 225K prior (revised from 224K), the U.S. Department of Labor said on Thursday.
